info.title: Food Pickup Platform API
info.description: REST API documentation for the Food Pickup Ordering Platform.

message.example: Your order FP1234 has been confirmed.
Your order FP1234 has been confirmed.

restaurantId.description: Optional when owner has one restaurant.

post.description: Restaurant owners may create categories for their own restaurants; admins may create for any active restaurant.

403.description: Not authorized to manage this category
Not authorized to manage this category

value.name: Chicken Biryani
value.description: Aromatic basmati rice with spiced chicken

get.summary: List menu items for a restaurant
List menu items for a category

put.summary: Mark all current user's notifications as read

post.description: Creates an order in the pending-payment business state and triggers ORDER_CREATED for the customer. Restaurant owners are not notified until payment succeeds.

put.description: Triggers customer notifications for CONFIRMED, PREPARING, READY_FOR_PICKUP, and COMPLETED. READY_FOR_PICKUP notifications include the pickup code.

post.description: On successful verification, triggers PAYMENT_SUCCESS for the customer and NEW_ORDER_RECEIVED for the restaurant owner. On signature verification failure, triggers PAYMENT_FAILED for the customer.
Creates an unapproved restaurant owned by the authenticated restaurant owner.

put.description: Restaurant owners may update their own restaurant; admins may update any restaurant. Owner updates reset approval.

403.description: Not authorized to manage this restaurant
Not authorized to manage this restaurant

put.description: Requires the ADMIN role and triggers RESTAURANT_APPROVED for the restaurant owner.

post.summary: Create a review for a completed order

400.description: Only completed orders can be reviewed

get.summary: List public reviews for a restaurant

put.summary: Reject settlement and refund reserved balance

parameters.name: restaurantId
parameters.description: Required for admins; optional for restaurant owners with multiple restaurants.
